name: What evidence do I need to prove my work caused my hearing loss?
description: Audiograms, noise logs, medical opinions proving job causation.[1]

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need to prove my work caused my hearing loss?

acceptedAnswer.text: Audiograms, noise logs, medical opinions proving job causation.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Medical audiograms, work exposure records, and expert testimony linking loss to job noise are essential.** Noise-induced hearing loss shows specific high-frequency patterns on tests, distinguishing from age-related loss.[1][2] Collect employer noise surveys, protection logs, coworker statements, and pre/post-job hearing tests. Lack of protection strengthens cases.[4] Preserve all documents before they disappear.
